calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-27-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day for name change..
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Yvonne Lee

Petitioner: Mikhail Zhazan, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Michael Khazan
Decree signed in open court
